faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Larchmont typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, ensuring transparent pricing for all Westchester homeowners.

faqs.question: What signs of termites should Larchmont homeowners look for?
faqs.answer: Look for mud tubes along foundation walls, hollow-sounding wood, discarded wings near windows or doors, and small piles of wood-colored droppings. In Larchmont's older homes, also check basements, crawl spaces, and areas with wood-to-soil contact. Our inspectors can identify even hidden termite activity during a comprehensive evaluation.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Larchmont homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Larchmont are completed within 1-2 days, depending on property size and treatment method. Liquid barrier treatments typically take 4-8 hours, while bait station installation is quicker. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your household while ensuring complete termite elimination.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite prevention services in Larchmont?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite prevention programs including soil treatments, bait monitoring systems, and annual inspections. Given Larchmont's mature trees and older housing stock, preventive measures are especially important. Our maintenance plans help protect your investment and catch any termite activity before major damage occurs.
